301.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever fasts three days of every month has fasted for all of time.'
301.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Siapa yang berpuasa tiga hari setiap bulan berarti ia telah berpuasa selamanya.'

302.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The evil eye can afflict a man, by the permission of Allah, until he climbs a steep mountain and then falls from it.'
302.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ain (mata jahat) dapat menimpa seorang pria, dengan izin Allah, hingga ia mendaki gunung yang curam kemudian jatuh darinya.'

303.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Do you know which deeds are most beloved to Allah, the Mighty and Majestic?' Someone said: 'Prayer and zakat.' Another said: 'Jihad.' He said: 'The most beloved deeds to Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, are love for the sake of Allah and hatred for the sake of Allah.'
303.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Tahukah kalian amal apa yang paling dicintai Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung?' Seseorang berkata: 'Shalat dan zakat.' Yang lain berkata: 'Jihad.' Beliau bersabda: 'Amal yang paling dicintai Allah adalah cinta karena Allah dan benci karena Allah.'

304.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was tending camels and sheep in a state of major ritual impurity, far from water, with his family present. He thought he had perished. He mounted a camel and arrived at the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at midday while he was sitting in the shade of the mosque.
304.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia sedang mengurus unta dan kambing dalam keadaan junub, jauh dari air, bersama keluarganya. Ia mengira dirinya akan binasa. Ia menaiki unta dan tiba di Rasulullah ﷺ pada tengah hari sementara beliau duduk di tempat teduh masjid.

305.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that something fell on his mind until he thought he had perished. He ordered his camel to be saddled, mounted it, and arrived at Madinah. He found the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the shade of the mosque with some companions. He greeted him and the Prophet raised his head and said: 'Subhanallah! Is that Abu Dharr?'
305.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sesuatu menimpanya hingga ia mengira dirinya akan binasa. Ia memerintahkan untanya untuk dipelana, menaikinya, dan tiba di Madinah. Ia mendapati Rasulullah ﷺ di tempat teduh masjid bersama beberapa sahabat. Ia memberi salam dan Nabi mengangkat kepalanya dan berkata: 'Subhanallah! Apakah itu Abu Dzarr?'

306.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'My close friend — meaning the Prophet ﷺ — said to me: Pray the prayer at its time. If you come to the people and they have already prayed, then pray with them and do not say: I have already prayed so I will not pray.'
306.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kekasihku — yaitu Nabi ﷺ — berkata kepadaku: Shalatlah pada waktunya. Jika kamu datang kepada orang-orang dan mereka telah shalat, maka shalatlah bersama mereka dan jangan katakan: Aku sudah shalat maka aku tidak akan shalat lagi.'

307.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The best thing with which to change white hair is henna and indigo.'
307.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Cara terbaik untuk mengubah uban adalah dengan hinna dan indigo (katam).'

308.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I visited him while he was praying and I saw him prolong the standing and multiply the bowing and prostrations. I mentioned this to him. He said: I did my best to excel. I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Whoever bows one bowing or makes one prostration, Allah raises him a degree and removes from him a sin.'
308.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengunjunginya sementara ia sedang shalat dan aku melihatnya memperpanjang berdiri dan memperbanyak ruku dan sujud. Aku menyebutkan ini kepadanya. Ia berkata: Aku berusaha sebaik mungkin untuk berprestasi. Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Siapa yang melakukan satu ruku atau satu sujud, Allah mengangkat derajatnya dan menghapus darinya satu dosa.'

309.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to a group: 'As for you, O Abu al-Darda, you almost missed the death of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ then embraced Islam and became one of the righteous Muslims. As for you, O Amr ibn al-As, you fought alongside the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
309.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada sekelompok orang: 'Adapun kamu, wahai Abu ad-Darda, kamu hampir melewatkan kematian Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian memeluk Islam dan menjadi salah satu dari kaum Muslimin yang saleh. Adapun kamu, wahai Amr ibn al-Ash, kamu berperang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ.'

310.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Successful is the one who purifies his heart for faith, makes his heart sound, his tongue truthful, his soul tranquil, and his character upright. He makes his ears attentive and his eyes observant — for the ears are a funnel and the eyes are a receptacle.'
310.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Beruntunglah orang yang memurnikan hatinya untuk iman, membuat hatinya baik, lidahnya jujur, jiwanya tenang, dan karakternya lurus. Ia membuat telinganya penuh perhatian dan matanya pengamat — karena telinga adalah corong dan mata adalah wadah.'

311.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, says: O son of Adam, if you came to Me with sins filling the earth while not associating anything with Me, I would come to you with forgiveness filling the earth.'
311.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, jika kamu datang kepada-Ku dengan dosa memenuhi bumi sementara tidak menyekutukan apapun dengan-Ku, Aku akan datang kepadamu dengan ampunan memenuhi bumi.'

312.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My nation will continue to be in a good state so long as they hasten the breaking of the fast and delay the pre-dawn meal.'
312.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Umatku akan terus berada dalam keadaan baik selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa dan mengakhirkan sahur.'

313.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about seeing the Lord. He said: 'I asked about it, and he said: I saw light — how could I see Him?'
313.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang melihat Rabb. Ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya tentangnya, dan beliau bersabda: Aku melihat cahaya — bagaimana aku bisa melihat-Nya?'

314.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given five things that were not given to anyone before me: I was sent to the red and the black; the earth was made a purification and a mosque for me; the spoils of war were made lawful for me while they were not lawful for anyone before me; I was given victory through awe at a distance of a month's journey; and I was given the right of intercession.'
314.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi lima hal yang tidak diberikan kepada siapapun sebelumku: Aku diutus kepada yang merah dan yang hitam; bumi dijadikan alat bersuci dan masjid bagiku; ghanimah dihalalkan bagiku sementara tidak dihalalkan bagi siapapun sebelumku; aku dibantu dengan rasa hormat dan kagum pada jarak satu bulan perjalanan; dan aku diberi hak syafaat.'

315.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If you came to Me with sins filling the earth and then met Me not associating anything with Me, I would meet you with forgiveness filling the earth.' The narrator said: 'Filling the earth means enough to fill the earth.'
315.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika kamu datang kepada-Ku dengan dosa memenuhi bumi kemudian menemuiku tanpa menyekutukan apapun dengan-Ku, Aku akan menemuimu dengan ampunan memenuhi bumi.' Perawi berkata: 'Memenuhi bumi berarti cukup untuk mengisi bumi.'

316.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Do you know if you depart on an even or odd number? But Allah knows. I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Whoever makes one prostration to Allah, Allah writes a good deed for him, removes a sin, and raises him a degree.'
316.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Apakah kamu tahu jika kamu pergi dalam jumlah genap atau ganjil? Tetapi Allah tahu. Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Siapa yang melakukan satu sujud kepada Allah, Allah menulis untuknya satu kebaikan, menghapus satu dosa, dan mengangkat derajatnya.'

317.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'There are three whom Allah will not speak to on the Day of Resurrection, will not look at, will not purify, and for whom there is a painful punishment.' He asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, who are they? They have lost and failed.' He repeated it three times. He said: 'The one who lets his garment hang low, the one who sells his goods with false oaths, and the one who gives and then reminds of his gift.'
317.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ada tiga orang yang tidak akan Allah ajak bicara pada Hari Kiamat, tidak melihat mereka, tidak mensucikan mereka, dan bagi mereka ada azab yang pedih.' Ia bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, siapa mereka? Mereka telah rugi dan gagal.' Beliau mengulanginya tiga kali. Beliau bersabda: 'Orang yang menjulurkan kain, orang yang menjual barangnya dengan sumpah palsu, dan orang yang memberi kemudian mengingatkan pemberiannya.'

318.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ told him about the Dajjal and said about him: 'I have concealed from you something: I concealed for you a goat's nose-rope and smoke.' He wanted to say 'smoke' but was unable.
318.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberitahunya tentang Dajjal dan berkata tentangnya: 'Aku telah menyembunyikan sesuatu darimu: Aku menyembunyikan untukmu tali hidung kambing dan asap.' Beliau ingin mengatakan asap tetapi tidak bisa.

319.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked: 'Which words are best?' He said: 'What Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has chosen for His servants — Subhan Allah wa bi-hamdihi (Glorified is Allah and praised is He).'
319.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya: 'Kalimat apa yang terbaik?' Beliau bersabda: 'Apa yang Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung pilih untuk hamba-Nya — Subhanallahi wa bihamdih.'

320.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'If My servant came to Me with sins filling the earth, I would meet him with forgiveness of the same magnitude.'
320.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika hamba-Ku datang kepada-Ku dengan dosa memenuhi bumi, Aku akan menemuinya dengan ampunan yang sama besarnya.'

321.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'It would not please me to have a mountain of gold and die with a dinar or half a dinar in it, except that I have set it aside for a debt.'
321.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku tidak senang memiliki gunung emas dan mati dengan satu dinar atau setengah dinar di dalamnya, kecuali aku telah menyisihkannya untuk melunasi hutang.'

322.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'A prayer is cut off by a woman, a donkey, and a black dog.' He was asked: 'What is the difference between a black dog and a red one?' He said: 'O nephew, I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as you have asked me, and he said: The black dog is a devil.'
322.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat terputus oleh wanita, keledai, dan anjing hitam.' Ia ditanya: 'Apa bedanya anjing hitam dengan yang merah?' Ia berkata: 'Wahai keponakanku, aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ sebagaimana kamu bertanya kepadaku, dan beliau bersabda: Anjing hitam adalah setan.'

323.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Abu Dharr, pray the prayer at its time. If you come to the people and they have already prayed, you will have secured your prayer. If they have not prayed yet, pray with them, and it will count as an extra prayer for you.'
323.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Abu Dzarr, shalatlah pada waktunya. Jika kamu datang kepada orang-orang dan mereka telah shalat, kamu telah mengamankan shalatmu. Jika mereka belum shalat, shalatlah bersama mereka, dan itu akan dihitung sebagai shalat tambahan bagimu.'

324.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'What do you command me if the people kill each other?' He said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He said: 'Stay in your house, lock your door.' He asked: 'And if I am not left alone?' He said: 'Go to the one you are with.'
324.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Apa yang kamu perintahkan kepadaku jika orang-orang saling membunuh?' Beliau bersabda: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih tahu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tetaplah di rumahmu, kunci pintumu.' Ia bertanya: 'Dan jika aku tidak dibiarkan?' Beliau bersabda: 'Pergi kepada orang yang kamu bersama.'

325.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'O Abu Dharr, when you cook a pot, add more broth and look after your neighbors — or distribute it among your neighbors.'
325.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Abu Dzarr, ketika kamu memasak periuk, tambahkan lebih banyak kuah dan perhatikan tetanggamu — atau bagikan kepada tetanggamu.'

326.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I asked: O Messenger of Allah, what are the vessels of the Hawd?' He said: 'By the One in whose hand is my soul, its vessels are more numerous than the stars of the sky and its planets on a dark clear night — vessels of Paradise. Whoever drinks from it will never be thirsty again.'
326.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya: Ya Rasulullah, apa wadah-wadah al-Haudh?' Beliau bersabda: 'Demi Zat yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, wadah-wadahnya lebih banyak dari bintang-bintang langit dan planetnya pada malam yang gelap lagi cerah — wadah-wadah dari Surga. Siapa yang minum darinya tidak akan pernah haus lagi.'

327.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ kept repeating a verse until morning during his prayer: 'If You punish them — they are Your servants; if You forgive them — You are the Almighty, the All-Wise.' In the morning he said: 'I asked my Lord, the Mighty and Majestic, for intercession for my nation and He gave it to me.'
327.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ terus mengulang sebuah ayat hingga pagi dalam shalatnya: 'Jika Engkau mengazab mereka — mereka adalah hamba-hamba-Mu; jika Engkau mengampuni mereka — Engkau adalah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Bijaksana.' Di pagi hari beliau bersabda: 'Aku memohon kepada Rabb-ku syafaat untuk umatku dan Dia memberikannya kepadaku.'

328.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'It would not please me to have gold pieces that I spent in the way of Allah while leaving even a qirat.' He said: 'I meant a qintar, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'A qirat' — three times. He then said: 'O Abu Dharr, I mention the smaller and not the greater.'
328.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku tidak senang memiliki emas yang aku belanjakan di jalan Allah sementara meninggalkan satu qirath pun.' Ia berkata: 'Aku maksudkan satu qinthar, ya Rasulullah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Satu qirath' — tiga kali. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Wahai Abu Dzarr, aku menyebut yang lebih kecil dan bukan yang lebih besar.'

329.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When one of you stands to pray, mercy faces him — so do not sweep the pebbles.'
329.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika salah seorang dari kalian berdiri untuk shalat, rahmat menghadapinya — maka jangan menyapu kerikil.'

330.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked about the best slave women. He said: 'The most precious to her owner and the most expensive in price.' He asked: 'And if I cannot find that?' He said: 'Help a craftsman or work for the inept.' He asked: 'And if I am unable?' He said: 'Withhold your harm from the people, for that is a charity you give on your own behalf.'
330.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya tentang budak wanita terbaik. Beliau bersabda: 'Yang paling berharga bagi pemiliknya dan paling mahal harganya.' Ia bertanya: 'Dan jika aku tidak bisa menemukannya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Bantu seorang pengrajin atau bekerja untuk yang tidak terampil.' Ia bertanya: 'Dan jika aku tidak mampu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tahan bahayamu dari orang-orang, karena itu adalah sedekah yang kamu berikan atas namamu sendiri.'

331.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you stands to pray, mercy faces him — so do not disturb the pebbles or touch them.'
331.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika salah seorang dari kalian berdiri untuk shalat, rahmat menghadapinya — maka jangan mengganggu kerikil atau menyentuhnya.'

332.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I asked: Which mosque was placed on earth first?' He said: 'The Sacred Mosque.' I asked: 'Then which?' He said: 'Al-Masjid al-Aqsa.' I asked: 'How long between them?' He said: 'Forty years.' I asked: 'Then what?' He said: 'Wherever prayer catches you, pray there — for it is a mosque.'
332.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya: Masjid mana yang pertama kali dibangun di bumi?' Beliau bersabda: 'Masjid al-Haram.' Aku bertanya: 'Kemudian yang mana?' Beliau bersabda: 'Masjid al-Aqsa.' Aku bertanya: 'Berapa lama di antara keduanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Empat puluh tahun.' Aku bertanya: 'Kemudian apa?' Beliau bersabda: 'Di mana pun shalat mendapatimu, shalatlah di sana — karena itu adalah masjid.'

333.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded him to fast the bright white days — the thirteenth, fourteenth, and fifteenth.
333.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan dia untuk berpuasa pada hari-hari putih yang cerah — hari ketiga belas, keempat belas, dan kelima belas.

334.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Prophet ﷺ about fasting and he commanded him to fast the thirteenth, fourteenth, and fifteenth.
334.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang puasa dan beliau memerintahkan dia untuk berpuasa pada hari ketiga belas, keempat belas, dan kelima belas.

335.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Shall I not point you to a treasure from the treasures of Paradise?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'There is no power and no strength except with Allah.'
335.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidakkah aku tunjukkan kepadamu sebuah harta dari harta-harta Surga?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Laa haula wa laa quwwata illaa billaah.'

336.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among the best things with which to change white hair are henna and indigo.'
336.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara cara terbaik untuk mengubah uban adalah hinna dan indigo.'

337.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among the best things with which to change white hair is henna and indigo.'
337.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara cara terbaik untuk mengubah uban adalah hinna dan indigo.'

338.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A woman is a rib — if you try to straighten her you will break her, and if you leave her, she has a bent but there is enjoyment in her.' She went and came back with tharid. He said: 'Eat and do not worry — I am fasting.'
338.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wanita itu seperti tulang rusuk — jika kamu mencoba meluruskannya kamu akan mematahkannya, dan jika kamu membiarkannya, ia bengkok tetapi ada kesenangan di dalamnya.' Ia pergi dan kembali membawa tharid. Beliau bersabda: 'Makanlah dan jangan khawatir — aku sedang berpuasa.'

339.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the types of men Allah loves: the warrior who exposes himself to the enemy until he is killed or grants victory to his companions; those who travel until they stop to rest and one among them steps aside and prays until he wakes them for departure; and the man whose neighbor harms him but he patiently endures until they are separated.
339.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang jenis-jenis pria yang dicintai Allah: pejuang yang mengekspos dirinya kepada musuh hingga terbunuh atau memberikan kemenangan kepada para sahabatnya; orang-orang yang bepergian hingga mereka berhenti untuk beristirahat dan salah seorang di antara mereka menyingkir dan shalat hingga membangunkan mereka untuk perjalanan; dan pria yang tetangganya menyakitinya tetapi ia bersabar hingga mereka dipisahkan.

340.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'No two Muslims whose three children die before reaching puberty will not be forgiven by Allah.'
340.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada dua pasang Muslim yang tiga anaknya meninggal sebelum mencapai usia baligh melainkan Allah akan mengampuni mereka.'

341.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No Muslim who spends two of everything he owns in the way of Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, will fail to be met by the gatekeepers of Paradise — every one of them calling him to what they have.' He asked: 'How so?' He said: 'If they are men, two men; if they are camels, two camels.'
341.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang Muslim yang menginfakkan dua dari setiap hartanya di jalan Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung melainkan ia akan disambut oleh para penjaga Surga — setiap satu dari mereka memanggilnya kepada apa yang mereka miliki.' Ia bertanya: 'Bagaimana?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika mereka adalah pria, dua pria; jika mereka adalah unta, dua unta.'

342.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that a prayer is cut off by a donkey, a woman, and a black dog. He was asked: 'O Abu Dharr, what is the difference between a black dog and a red or yellow one?' He said: 'O nephew, I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as you have asked me, and he said: The black dog is a devil.'
342.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa shalat terputus oleh keledai, wanita, dan anjing hitam. Ia ditanya: 'Wahai Abu Dzarr, apa bedanya anjing hitam dengan yang merah atau kuning?' Ia berkata: 'Wahai keponakanku, aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ sebagaimana kamu bertanya kepadaku, dan beliau bersabda: Anjing hitam adalah setan.'

343.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given both of them — the last two verses of Surah Al-Baqarah — from a treasure trove from a house beneath the Throne. No prophet before me was given them.'
343.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi keduanya — dua ayat terakhir Surah Al-Baqarah — dari gudang harta dari rumah di bawah Arsy. Tidak ada nabi sebelumku yang diberikannya.'

344.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) — or from another narrator — that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given the concluding verses of Surah Al-Baqarah from a treasury beneath the Throne that was not given to any prophet before me.'
344.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — atau dari perawi lain — bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi ayat-ayat penutup Surah Al-Baqarah dari perbendaharaan di bawah Arsy yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi manapun sebelumku.'

345.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I was given the concluding verses of Surah Al-Baqarah from a treasury beneath the Throne, and no prophet before me was given them.'
345.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberi ayat-ayat penutup Surah Al-Baqarah dari perbendaharaan di bawah Arsy, dan tidak ada nabi sebelumku yang diberikannya.'

346.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Shall I not point you to a treasure from the treasures of Paradise? There is no power and no strength except with Allah.'
346.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidakkah aku tunjukkan kepadamu sebuah harta dari harta-harta Surga? Laa haula wa laa quwwata illaa billaah.'

347.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said to him: 'Stay where you are, O Abu Dharr, until I come to you.' He went until he was hidden from sight. He heard voices and commotion and thought the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had been accosted. He waited until he returned.
347.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Tetaplah di tempatmu, wahai Abu Dzarr, sampai aku kembali kepadamu.' Beliau pergi hingga tersembunyi dari pandangan. Ia mendengar suara-suara dan keramaian dan mengira Rasulullah ﷺ telah dihentikan. Ia menunggu sampai beliau kembali.

348.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu Dharr was standing and then sat, then lay down. He was asked: 'O Abu Dharr, why did you sit then lie down?' He replied: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to us: If one of you gets angry while standing, let him sit. If the anger passes, fine; if not, let him lie down.'
348.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abu Dzarr sedang berdiri kemudian duduk, lalu berbaring. Ia ditanya: 'Wahai Abu Dzarr, mengapa kamu duduk kemudian berbaring?' Ia menjawab: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada kami: Jika salah seorang dari kalian marah saat berdiri, hendaklah ia duduk. Jika amarah berlalu, baik; jika tidak, hendaklah ia berbaring.'

349.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'Would you like a treasure from the treasures of Paradise?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'There is no power and no strength except with Allah.'
349.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Maukah kamu sebuah harta dari harta-harta Surga?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Laa haula wa laa quwwata illaa billaah.'

350.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If any of you is fasting three days of the month, let him fast the bright white days — the thirteenth, fourteenth, and fifteenth.'
350.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian berpuasa tiga hari dalam sebulan, hendaklah ia berpuasa pada hari-hari putih yang cerah — hari ketiga belas, keempat belas, dan kelima belas.'
